creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195101
[PATCH] benchmarks/vegeta: update to 8.1.1

prior to this version, the GH_TAGNAME was not used because upstream repository was using standard tag names. it changed.

'v8.1.1' was tagged 'cli/8.1.1' and so I decided to use the commit tag but still sticking with the version number from upstream.

while here, also updated "golang.org/x/net" to 'd0887ba'.
